text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out on a walk by<n>myself, I
find Hishi Amazon mulling<n>over something.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you. Listen, I want your<n>advice on
something. I've been<n>having trouble nailing my
sprint in the<n>final stretch lately.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I want to just blow past the pack, but<n>I keep
finding my way forward<n>blocked off.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think I should do when that<n>happens?
choice_data_list:
Blow the other racers away with sheer force of
will.
Go wide on the outside, then make your move.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying I gotta beat the<n>others not just
in speed, but in spirit<n>too, huh? Yeah, that makes
sense.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I hate to admit it, but with the kind of<n>results I've
been getting lately, my<n>confidence might've
taken a hit.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time to get more pumped<n>than ever and
get racin'!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: From the outside? Yeah, that could<n>work!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to cover more ground doing<n>it that way,
but that shouldn't be an<n>issue if I just run faster!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, I gotta buff up this body so<n>that I win
even from the outer track!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
First thing on my list is reassessing<n>my basic
training! Your daily efforts<n>are what pays off
when it matters,<n>after all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the advice and getting me<n>outta that
rut! My next race'll be my<n>best yet! I can feel it!
